title: Production GitHub sync for active version and bugs
body:
Bidirectional GitHub sync scoped to the active delivery version and all bugs. Tracker SQLite is source of truth; export outbox pushes to GitHub; webhooks apply inbound updates.

## Landed

- Normalized SQLite schema (versions, tasks, bugs, outbox, links)
- Settings dialog with sync scope, webhook config, and catalog import
- Scoped export (`7461652`) and inbound webhook handler
- Operator validation steps in [`beskid_tracker/COOLIFY.md`](beskid_tracker/COOLIFY.md)

## Remaining (production evidence required)

- Set `GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET`, `GITHUB_SYNC_TOKEN`, `TRACKER_PUBLIC_URL` on Coolify (OpenBao `secret/beskid/production/tracker`)
- Register GitHub webhook → `POST /api/webhooks/github`
- Smoke: import v0.4 seed → export active version → confirm issue create/update on Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Catalog tip:** [`ee88edf`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/ee88edf) (2026-06-07)

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4
- **Workstream:** `tracker-implementation`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-tracker-ship`

subtasks.text: SQLite SOT + scoped bidirectional sync engine
Coolify secrets (webhook secret, sync token, public URL)
Production smoke: seed import + scoped export
